docket_entries.description: SANCTIONS ORDERED IN THE AMOUNT OF $400.00 AGAINST JIUNG KIM FOR FAILURE TO APPEAR AT THE ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE HEARING ON: DEC-08-2015, PAYABLE ON OR BEFORE DEC-24-2015. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
MINI MINUTES FOR DEC-08-2015 10:30 AM FOR DEPT 610
MINI MINUTES FOR MAR-08-2016 10:30 AM FOR DEPT 610

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR DEC-08-2015 IN DEPARTMENT 610 AT 10:30 AM FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) AND OBTAIN ANSWER(S), OR ENTER DEFAULT(S). THE OCT-28-2015 CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
CASE DISMISSED WITHOUT PREJUDICE BY COURT AT ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE HEARING MAR-08-2016 AT 10:30 AM. THIS DISMISSAL IS PURSUANT TO PLAINTIFF'S REQUEST. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR DEC-08-2015 CONTINUED TO MAR-08-2016 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 610 FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) AND OBTAIN ANSWER(S), OR ENTER DEFAULT(S). NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

CONTRACT/WARRANTY, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF KIM, JIUNG AS TO DEFENDANT BOYER, CHRIS (AT&T) (AT&T) SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR OCT-28-2015 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  JUL-27-2015 CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT DUE ON         OCT-05-2015

calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Mar-09-2016 Dismissal
MINI MINUTES: Appearance by self-represented Plaintiff Jiung Kim. Court ordered case dismissed without prejudice at the request of Plaintiff. JUDGE CYNTHIA M. LEE; Clerk RWoods. Proceedings not reported. (610)

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Dec-09-2015 Continued To Mar-08-16 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
MINI MINUTES: No appearance. Self-represented Plaintiff is sanctioned $400.00 for failure to appear. The Order to Show Cause is reset to MAR-08-2016 at 10:30 AM in Department 610. JUDGE JOHN K. STEWART; Clerk MOlopernes. Proceedings not reported. (610)

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Oct-08-2015 Set For Order To Show Cause On Dec-08-15 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
